227.reason: [When encountering a single '&', it should report an error with category code 'a', but the Token's value is set to the line number as a string; however, in printError(), it outputs `value << " a"`, implying `value` must be the line number. But `line` is only incremented on newline, and starts at 0, so `line+1` may be incorrect if the error occurs before any newline is seen. More critically, the global `line` variable is uninitialized.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [When encountering a single '&', it should report an error with category code 'a', but the Token's value is set to the line number as a string; however, in printError(), it outputs `value << " a"`, implying `value` must be the line number. But `line` is only incremented on newline, and starts at 0, so `line+1` may be incorrect if the error occurs before any newline is seen. More critically, the global `line` variable is uninitialized.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Error value should be line number as string, but line counting may be off because line is initialized to 0 and only incremented on '\n'; also, error type 'a' requires outputting line number and "a", but this returns line+1 prematurely without context]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Error value should be line number as string, but line counting may be off due to comment/whitespace handling; also, error type 'a' requires outputting line number and 'a', but this returns line number as token value without context]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.25 , reason:  [Error value should be line number as string, but line counting may be off due to comment handling and newline logic]
